content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于8月18日 23:20 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月1日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、相位对弈
● 命轮「苍白后裔」效果调整为：每回合首次受到敌方主动攻击后，对其造成 3 层缠绕。算力消耗降低为 2 。
● 命轮「至为珍贵的藏品」效果调整为：装备时获得 3 层缠绕。每有 1 个阵亡友方，强效+3。
 
二、问题修复
● 修复了唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」灵塑适性「基础属性」未能随灵塑等级成长的描述错误问题，对实际效果没有影响。
● 修复了唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」灵塑适性「银钥回复」未能随灵塑等级成长的问题。
● 修复了命轮活动唤醒「死亡如约」的命轮功能介绍中错误包含了「获取暴击率」效果的问题。
● 修复了「异梦视界」和「典藏馆」中，部分「新」提示无法被正确消除的问题。
● 修复了「邀请活动」中「绑定邀请」规则说明存在错别字的问题。
● 优化了「源液不足」的提示文本。
● 修复了玩法活动「坠临的万千耀光」造物「深暗之焰」燃烧词缀描述错误的问题。
● 修复了黑池返还命轮或唤醒体后，即使重新获得该命轮或唤醒体，「相位对弈」收藏中也会错误地显示为不可用的问题。
● 「相位对弈」部分弃牌效果改为了双方可见，已于版本更新实装进游戏内。
● 修复了命轮「纯银的初心」获得的护盾错误为 1 的问题。
● 修复了「通讯器」中拉蒙娜对话中的一处文本错误，删除了多余的「的」。

V2.3.1.1 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on August 18 at 23:20. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on <t:1756742399:F>. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Traphase
● Wheel of Destiny "Pale Descendant" effect adjusted to: After being attacked by an enemy's active attack for the first time each turn, apply 3 stacks of Entwined to the attacker. Arithmetica cost reduced to 2.

● Wheel of Destiny "Treasured Rarity" effect adjusted to: Gain 3 layers of Entwined when equipped. For each fallen ally, Amplification +3.

II. Problem Fix
● Fixed a description error where the "Base Attributes" of the Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" Soulforge Aptitude did not scale with Soulforge levels. This issue had no impact on actual effects.
● Fixed the issue where the Soulforge Aptitude "Keyflare Healing" of Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" did not scale with Soulforge level.
● Fixed an issue where the "Critical Rate Gain" effect was incorrectly included in the Wheel of Destiny function description for the WoD Event Awakening "From Fomalhaut".
● Fixed an issue where some "New" prompts in "Dreamscape" and "Premium Gallery" could not be properly removed.
● Fixed a typo in the rules description for "Binding Invitation" in "The Invitation Event".
● Optimized the hint text for "Insufficient Silver Prime".
● Fixed an issue with the Burn affix description for the Relic "Blackened Flame" in the "A Million Suns Descend" gameplay event.
● Fixed an issue where after returning a Wheel of Destiny or Awakener to the Black Pool, even if the same Wheel or Awakener was reacquired, it would be incorrectly displayed as unavailable in the "Traphase" collection.
● The discard effect in "Traphase" is now visible to both players and has been implemented in the game as part of the latest update.
● Fixed the issue where the shield gained from the Wheel of Destiny "Heart of Silver" was incorrectly set to 1.
No , I mean new character in standard banner , like Salvador, cause before in game we can see date . Now they take this information out
